questions:
1. **"At LojistikZeka, you led the migration from a fragile LangChain pipeline to a custom orchestration engine—a high-stakes project with direct financial impact (₺15M saved annually). Walk me through a moment where you had to push back against a senior stakeholder—perhaps in logistics or finance—who resisted the change due to fear of disruption. How did you balance technical conviction with their emotional concerns? What specific language or framing did you use to align them without dismissing their worries?"**

2. **"Your open-source project, Auto-Dev-Reviewer, was adopted by 15+ teams in Turkey—meaning you had to collaborate with developers outside your direct control, likely with varying coding standards and egos. Tell me about a time one of those external contributors reacted defensively to your agent’s feedback on their PR. How did you de-escalate the situation? Did you adjust the agent’s tone or involve human mediation? How do you design AI tools to *preserve* human relationships, not just automate tasks?"**
